name: Authority Strain Transfer
description: Useless to those without multiple authorities, but allows those with to convert strain of one authority into strain of another.

name: Transference of Thoughts
description: A form of telepathy.

name: Power Theft
description: Upon slaughtering an opponent, transfer a fraction of their strength to yourself, only works once a day, uses increase with rank.

name: Ledger of Time
description: Pull a resource from your own future, hp, mental energy ect, if this debt is not paid by your future within a certain time, you take extreme backlashes.

name: Loan Root
description: Let someone else borrow one your roots. You will lose access to that root until you retrieve it, and they will receive it at the rank of this root, or the rank of the actual root, whichever is lower.

name: Physical Enhancement
description: Increases physicality stat by 1 each level.

name: Fortunes Eyes
description: Another broken root, allows you to glimpse at a person's fate.

name: Mind-Dagger Storm
description: Condense mental energy into a dagger that you can mentally control.

name: Personal Abode
description: Creates and ties a small dimension to you which you will have to cultivate manually.

name: Plant Cue
description: Expend mental energy to implant a mental cue upon someone; mental cues cannot control minds, but merely plant suggestions.

name: Control Presence
description: Control the presence and aura leaking off of you; higher tiers can even conceal authorities.

name: Arrow Propulsion
description: Fire an arrow without a bow, complimentary to Arcane Arrow.

name: Mark of Tracking
description: Leave a nigh-undetectable mark on an item which you can reliably sense for the next 24 hours so long as it remains within the same plane or dimension.

name: Danger Sense
description: Gain intuition toward when your life is in danger; higher tiers are almost precognitive.

name: Stone Skin
description: Passive damage reduction

name: Iron Bones
description: Passive damage reduction

name: Steel Flesh
description: Passive damage reduction

name: Arcane Affinity
description: Helps with skill theory relating to magical ideas.

name: Arcane Sense
description: Helps sense things magical.

name: Resonance
description: Helps reduce friction between different magics.

name: Arcane Flesh
description: Increases flesh affinity to inscribed magics; requires Resonance to not conflict with Physique.

name: Load
description: A passive root designed to boost your body's ability to handle multiple powers at once.

name: Spiral
description: Compresses ranged magic into a spiral to improve penetrative power.

name: Calibration
description: Automatically augments effects used in tandem with it to help achieve a desired effect.

name: Flesh Construct
description: Make an additional physical construct every tier.

name: Cosmetic Share
description: Share a visual property of an object with another object, such as shiny or dull.

name: Mental Energy Tap
description: Place a mark upon an opponent and drain some mental energy.

name: Life Tap
description: A mark-based root with a donor mark and a receiver mark. Drains vitality from the donor-marked target to give it to the receiver-marked target.

name: Sleep Tap
description: A mark-based root with a donor mark and a receiver mark. Drains wakefulness from the donor-marked target to give it to the receiver-marked target.

name: Sub-Sleep
description: Causes a small portion of your mind to sleep even when awake, allowing for slow mental energy recovery.

name: Mental Balance
description: Pick willing individuals and balance Mental Energy between them.

name: Life Burn
description: Temporarily burn your Life Force to gain Mental Energy, temporarily lowering max HP until it recovers.

name: Devoted Mentor
description: Mark someone as your student; if they are of an equal or lesser rank than you, they gain bonus XP.

name: See Progress
description: Grants the ability to deeply quantify and analyze your growth, quantified using the XP scale of the Bloodline Shop.

name: Rejuvanative Flesh
description: Your flesh is more receptive to growth and learning, letting you train more often without issues; this affects all stats.

name: Flesh to Mind
description: Consume your progress in training your physical self to improve your mental self.

name: Skill Web
description: Form links between your skills, allowing for a boost to growth so long as they exist.

name: Hyperbolic Mental Chamber
description: Create a mental environment where time flies faster. Authority strain does not recover faster here.

name: Authority-Mallable
description: Increases your malleability to Authorities you obtain, amplifying skill theory perks or alterations to your body. You cannot advance beyond the 5th root until you obtain an Authority.

name: Life-Death Rotation Refinement
description: Burn Life Force to obtain physical growth.

name: Pocket Strike
description: Store the damage of an attack against you. It is replaced by whatever attack is currently stored, and can only be removed by replacing it with another attack.

name: Mental Cancellation
description: Consume Mental Energy to deny damage.

name: Timeline Drop
description: Throw yourself a few dozen seconds into the future, allowing you to escape lethal damage.

name: Erasure
description: Deny a strike against you. Limited uses; cannot deny a higher-tier attack.

name: Armored Skin
description: Reinforce your skin to be tough like certain metals.

name: Reinanimate
description: Once a day, if you would take lethal damage, you survive barely.

name: Rotate Gravity
description: Define the new down.

name: Sky Step
description: "So long as I want to walk, there will be a path" - Cole Ashen

name: Road of the Cursed Path Mage
description: It grants additional root slots, but gives a curse for each root added. At novice, you can take a second first root; at mage, a second second root; and so on.

name: Exploding Vitality
description: A broken root in the bad sense, not overpowered. It allows you to burn vitality to deal damage, requires large amounts of HP, and is mainly worth taking because it is cheap.

name: Light Footed
description: Provides substantial benefits to movement. A magician can move without disturbing even the dust beneath their feet.

name: Partial Invisibility
description: Partially conceals your form, aiding in stealthy maneuvers.

name: Spectral Links
description: Make a construct of mental energy, links of mental energy, too weak to bind but strong enough to injure those they clash upon.

name: Reinforced Blade
description: Enhance a weapon within your hand.

name: Lesser Teleportation
description: Teleport to a location you can see within range.

name: Sunlit Reinforcement
description: Use the Embers and grace of the sun to reinforce your flesh.

name: Arcane Lock
description: Seal a door or container with your power. Strength and duration improve with tier.

name: Counter-pulse
description: Release a directed wave of energy which can counter a strike from an attack of a tier above the root. Creates a dedicated daily resource and relies heavily on personal spiritual strength.

name: Mirror Strike
description: Absorb a fraction of attacks against you, then augment an attack to reflect it back at the opponent.

name: Earth Shield
description: Create a shield of earth which will hover around you defensively.

name: Cascading Defense
description: Increase your defences based on how many attacks have hit you in that moment or turn.

name: Reject Strike
description: A limited number of times a day, nullify a strike at or below the tier of the root.

name: Stable Footing
description: Increase your innate footwork skills to enhance dodging capabilities.

name: Mental Recovery
description: Slowly recover Mental Energy, even if you do not sleep.

name: Conceptualise Energy
description: Add an idea to your mental energy, making it more effective at tasks related to that idea. The concept cannot be removed.

name: Link
description: Create a connection between you and someone using mental energy.

name: Mental Bullet
description: Shoot a burst of mental energy at someone.

name: Move Mass
description: Move mass using mental energy.

name: Insight Theft
description: Mark someone and steal some of their proficiency whenever they gain it in a skill.

name: To the Victor Goes the Spoils
description: When someone dies within range, claim some of their remaining resources if you already contain some of that type yourself.

name: Marked with Nothing
description: Create a link to the Nothing outside of reality, enabling siphoning even without direct access.

name: Echo Ability
description: Create a weakened version of a trait used against you. As a second root, it is extremely limited.

name: Pattern Recognition
description: Increase your ability to notice patterns among your skills, granting a small variable boost to skill theory.

name: Mental Feedback
description: Provide feedback to anything related to skill theory, offering a flat boost to skills and techniques.

name: Perfect Retention
description: Remember any insights into skill theory you gain perfectly, preventing deterioration over time.

name: Overlearn
description: Forcefully obtain insight into a skill at cost.

name: Transfer Message
description: Pass a message to someone within range. Higher tiers allow two-way communication.

name: Transfer Emotion
description: Give an emotion you are experiencing, or take someone else's for a brief moment.

name: Transfer Element
description: Temporarily transfer a simple elemental property of the world onto yourself or another. Does not stack.

name: Energy Bolt
description: A ranged blast of energy. Starts at 10 meters of range, but doubles every tier.

name: Soul Spike
description: Deals damage of an undefendable kind, but uses your own soul as fuel and is not easy to heal from.

name: Detect Soul
description: Not all souls are visible; this root helps you perceive souls that would otherwise go unnoticed.

name: Find Truth
description: Helps you train your own soul, though it is not the most efficient method.

name: Arcane Arrow
description: Conjures an arrow for a bow. Useless unless you learn bowmanship, unless you want the complimentary fourth root.

name: Stare of Immobilization
description: Slow the movement speed of an individual you are looking at. Effectiveness increases with tier.

name: Shared Retardation
description: Sacrifice a certain amount of your mental prowess, and an opponent also loses that amount. Higher tiers may increase targets or increase the amount lost.

name: Marks of Weakness, Marks of Woe
description: Place a mark upon someone, and they lose physical prowess.

name: Skilled Learner
description: Helps you with skill theory of a chosen type. Pick stealth and it is basically a stealth root.
